description_long: This car store is a large, gated commercial property with a paved lot and a multi-sectioned building featuring steep, dark gray roofs and light stone walls. The front area includes a spacious parking lot with several cars, a central circular green space with a blossoming tree, and a secure perimeter fence. The building itself has multiple wings, large windows, and a main entrance facing the parking lot, with additional garage doors and service areas visible on the sides and rear. The rear section contains utility tanks, a small pool, and outdoor seating, suggesting both showroom and service functions. The overall design is clean and organized, with clear separation between customer, display, and service zones.
description: A large, stone-walled car store with a dark roof, gated parking lot, and landscaped front area featuring several displayed cars and a central tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, parking lot with cars, central tree, and gated fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped area, side building extension, and partial view of the rear amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying utility tanks, a small pool, outdoor seating, and garage/service areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional parking, the building's side profile, and the central tree in the lot.
attribute_displayed_cars: Four cars visible in the front lot: one white SUV, one blue sedan, one red sedan, and one orange sedan, all parked in front of the main entrance.
attribute_glass_facade: No full glass facade; standard-sized windows are present on the building's front and sides.
attribute_architectural_style: contemporary with traditional elements, featuring steep gabled roofs and stone cladding.
